gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.first_name, T3.last_name, T3.phone FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T1.link_to_member WHERE T1.cost > ( SELECT AVG(T1.cost) FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T1.link_to_member )
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)
question: Give the full name and contact number of members who had to spend more than average on each expense.
